# school_blacklist.txt — Education sector extra feed
# Loaded when PRODUCT_MODE=minifw_school (sector: education)
# Add blocked domains/patterns below (fnmatch syntax: *.example.com)
#
# Categories: social media during school hours, gambling, adult content, VPN providers
*.4chan.org
*.chaturbate.com
*.pornhub.com
*.xvideos.com
*.onlyfans.com
*.bet365.com
*.pokerstars.com
*.draftkings.com

expressvpn.com
surfshark.com
hidemyass.com
proxy.org
*.proxysite.com
